---
pagetitle: "Yueswater Blog"
lang: en
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
editor: source
sidebar: false
search: false
repo-actions: false
description: |
  A personal blog by Anthony — tutorials on Python, R, and LaTeX, alongside projects and life notes.
image: images/og-image.png
listing:
  - id: en-latest-articles
    contents:
    - "articles/posts/**/*-en.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: en-latest-projects
    contents:
    - "projects/posts/**/*-en.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: en-latest-diary
    contents:
    - "diary/posts/**/*-en.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

toc: false
alternate-lang: "/index.html"
---

::: {.pullout-text}
::: {.pullout-container}
::: {.pullout-block .black-background}
![](images/quote-purple.png){width="100px"}

## The best programs are written so that computing machines can perform them quickly and so that human beings can understand them clearly.
Donald Knuth, "*The Art of Computer Programming*"

::: {.button}
[Read the tutorials](articles/index.qmd)
:::

:::
:::
:::

::: {.header-text}
::: {.content-container}
::: {.header-block}
A personal blog by **Anthony** — tutorials on **Python**, **R**, and **LaTeX**, things I've built, and notes from everyday life. Stay curious.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="articles/index.qmd">

## Article
</a>

::: {#en-latest-articles}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="projects/index.qmd">

## Project
</a>

::: {#en-latest-projects}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="diary/index.qmd">

## Diary
</a>

::: {#en-latest-diary}
:::

:::
:::
